title: Danjong of Joseon becomes king of Joseon Dynasty
fact: Danjong, personal name Yi Hong-wi, was the sixth monarch of the Joseon dynasty of Korea.

title: Sejong the Great becomes king of Joseon Dynasty
fact: Sejong, commonly known as Sejong the Great, was the fourth monarch of the Koreanic state Joseon.

title: Gojong of the Korean Empire becomes king of Joseon Dynasty
fact: Gojong, personal name Yi Myeongbok, later Yi Hui, also known as the Gwangmu Emperor, was the penultimate Korean monarch.

title: Sejo of Joseon becomes king of Joseon Dynasty
fact: Sejo, personal name Yi Yu, sometimes known as Grand Prince Suyang, was the seventh monarch of the Joseon dynasty of Korea.

title: Taejo of Joseon becomes king of Joseon Dynasty
fact: Taejo, personal name Yi Sŏnggye, later changed to Yi Tan, was the founder and first monarch of the Joseon dynasty of Korea.

title: Taejong of Joseon becomes king of Joseon Dynasty
fact: Taejong, personal name Yi Pangwŏn, was the third monarch of the Joseon dynasty of Korea and the father of Sejong the Great.

title: Jeongjo of Joseon becomes king of Joseon Dynasty
fact: Jeongjo, personal name Yi San, sometimes called Jeongjo the Great, was the 22nd monarch of the Joseon dynasty of Korea.

title: Yeongjo of Joseon becomes king of Joseon Dynasty
fact: Yeongjo, personal name Yi Geum, was the 21st monarch of the Joseon dynasty of Korea.

title: Seonjo of Joseon becomes king of Joseon Dynasty
fact: Seonjo, personal name Yi Yeon, was the 14th monarch of Joseon.

title: Sukjong of Joseon becomes king of Joseon Dynasty
fact: Sukjong, personal name Yi Sun, was the 19th monarch of the Joseon dynasty of Korea.

title: Sunjo of Joseon becomes king of Joseon Dynasty
fact: Sunjo, personal name Yi Gong, was a Korean royal who was the 23rd monarch of the Joseon dynasty of Korea.

title: Heonjong of Joseon becomes king of Joseon Dynasty
fact: Heonjong, personal name Yi Hwan, was the 24th monarch of the Joseon dynasty of Korea.
